rationale: Educ. Code §31.0212 governs the mechanics of instructional materials and technology accounts maintained by the commissioner. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: The commissioner shall maintain an instructional materials and technology account for each school district.
_note: No textual link between §31.0212 and the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Indirect fiscal pressure on school funding is possible but not a textual conflict.
